{{Quote|Those are Black Sun Fighters. Those are the fighters that supposedly replaced the Star Viper.|Aeron Azzameen|<ref name="XWA" />}}
The '''Supa Fighter''' was manufactured by [[Joraan Drive Systems]] for the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] criminal organization during the height of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]].

==Characteristics==
A large [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] with decent armament, the Supa Fighter was slower than an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] but more maneuverable. Its [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] and hull strength were comparable to a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]]. The Supa Fighter's hull was mostly symmetrical, but in an unusual feature for a starfighter, the cockpit was offset a few meters to the left of its centerline.

Supa Fighters were most often used to defend Black Sun convoys and respond to attacks on Black Sun-allied facilities.<ref name="RECG" /> In this regard, it almost completely replaced the [[StarViper-class attack platform/Legends|StarViper-class attack platform]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
